final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic poster illustrating step-by-step instructions for deploying Hermes inside a Docker container and integrating it with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: clean flat vector infographic, technical documentation style, isometric icons for containers and code blocks
Composition: vertical single-column layout, four numbered steps stacked top to bottom, each step in a distinct card/panel
Subject: four clearly labeled steps — Step 1: pull Docker image for Hermes; Step 2: run and configure the Docker container; Step 3: install and configure GLMCodingPlan inside the container; Step 4: verify integration and test connection — each step accompanied by a terminal command snippet and a small icon
Scene/backdrop: neutral light gray background, subtle grid pattern suggesting a technical/developer environment
Lighting/mood: flat, even, no shadows — clean and readable technical document aesthetic
Color palette: deep navy blue as primary structural color, bright teal as accent for step numbers and highlights, white card backgrounds for each step panel
Text (verbatim): "1" "2" "3" "4", "Hermes", "GLMCodingPlan", "Docker"
Constraints: step numbers 1 2 3 4 must be visually prominent and immediately legible; terminal/code snippets must appear as monospace text blocks; layout must be readable at poster scale
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, gradients, decorative flourishes, clipart, watermark, blurry text
